articles.title: Once viewed as a rental, could Viktor Arvidsson be ideal ‘bridge’ forward for Bruins?
articles.description:
"I knew already, he's not going anywhere."

The post Once viewed as a rental, could Viktor Arvidsson be ideal ‘bridge’ forward for Bruins? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Viktor Arvidsson may become a key forward for the Bruins moving forward.
Bruins management indicates Arvidsson is not being traded before the deadline.
His potential extension could strengthen the team's playoff chances for Boston fans.
